1→import type { CanvasState, DrawingProject } from './types'
     2→
     3→const DATA_DIR = './data'
     4→
     5→export const saveProject = async (state: CanvasState, filename: string): Promise<string> => {
     6→  const project: DrawingProject = {
     7→    version: '1.0.0',
     8→    state,
     9→    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    10→    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    11→  }
    12→  const path = `${DATA_DIR}/${filename}.json`
    13→  await Bun.write(path, JSON.stringify(project, null, 2))
    14→  return path
    15→}
    16→
    17→export const loadProject = async (filename: string): Promise<CanvasState | null> => {
    18→  const path = `${DATA_DIR}/${filename}.json`
    19→  const file = Bun.file(path)
    20→  if (!(await file.exists())) return null
    21→  const project = (await file.json()) as DrawingProject
    22→  return project.state
    23→}
    24→
    25→export const listProjects = async (): Promise<string[]> => {
    26→  const glob = new Bun.Glob('*.json')
    27→  const files: string[] = []
    28→  for await (const file of glob.scan({ cwd: DATA_DIR })) {
    29→    files.push(file.replace('.json', ''))
    30→  }
    31→  return files
    32→}
    33→
    34→export const deleteProject = async (filename: string): Promise<boolean> => {
    35→  const path = `${DATA_DIR}/${filename}.json`
    36→  const file = Bun.file(path)
    37→  if (!(await file.exists())) return false
    38→  await Bun.$`rm ${path}`
    39→  return true
    40→}
    41→
    42→export const exportPng = async (
    43→  canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    44→  filename: string,
    45→): Promise<string> => {
    46→  const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png')
    47→  const base64 = dataUrl.split(',')[1]
    48→  const buffer = Buffer.from(base64, 'base64')
    49→  const path = `${DATA_DIR}/${filename}.png`
    50→  await Bun.write(path, buffer)
    51→  return path
    52→}
    53→
    54→export const importPng = async (filename: string): Promise<string | null> => {
    55→  const path = `${DATA_DIR}/${filename}.png`
    56→  const file = Bun.file(path)
    57→  if (!(await file.exists())) return null
    58→  const buffer = await file.arrayBuffer()
    59→  const base64 = Buffer.from(buffer).toString('base64')
    60→  return `data:image/png;base64,${base64}`
    61→}
    62→

   190→type ToolDef = {
   191→  id: ToolType
   192→  label: string
   193→}
   194→
   195→const tools: ToolDef[] = [
   196→  { id: 'pen', label: 'Pen' },
   197→  { id: 'line', label: 'Line' },
   198→  { id: 'rectangle', label: 'Rect' },
   199→  { id: 'circle', label: 'Circle' },
   200→  { id: 'eraser', label: 'Eraser' },
   201→]
   202→
   203→export const renderToolbar = (activeTool: ToolType, canUndo: boolean, canRedo: boolean) =>
   204→  h('div', { style: styles.toolbar },
   205→    ...tools.map((tool) =>
   206→      h('button', {
   207→        style: tool.id === activeTool ? styles.toolButtonActive : styles.toolButton,
   208→        'p-trigger': `tool-select:${tool.id}`,
   209→        title: tool.label,
   210→      }, tool.label),
   211→    ),
   212→    h('div', { style: styles.separator }),
   213→    h('span', { style: styles.label }, 'Color:'),
   214→    h('input', {
   215→      type: 'color',
   216→      value: '#000000',
   217→      style: styles.colorInput,
   218→      'p-trigger': 'color-change',
   219→      'p-target': 'color-picker',
   220→    }),
   221→    h('div', { style: styles.separator }),
   222→    h('span', { style: styles.label }, 'Size:'),
   223→    h('input', {
   224→      type: 'range',

   226→      max: '50',
   227→      value: '3',
   228→      style: styles.rangeInput,
   229→      'p-trigger': 'size-change',
   230→      'p-target': 'size-slider',
   231→    }),
   232→    h('span', { style: { ...styles.label, minWidth: '24px' }, 'p-target': 'size-display' }, '3'),
   233→    h('div', { style: styles.separator }),
   234→    h('button', {
   235→      style: canUndo ? styles.actionButton : styles.disabledButton,
   236→      'p-trigger': 'undo',
   237→      disabled: !canUndo,
   238→    }, 'Undo'),
   239→    h('button', {
   240→      style: canRedo ? styles.actionButton : styles.disabledButton,
   241→      'p-trigger': 'redo',
   242→      disabled: !canRedo,
   243→    }, 'Redo'),
   244→    h('div', { style: styles.separator }),
   245→    h('button', {
   246→      style: styles.actionButton,
   247→      'p-trigger': 'clear',
   248→    }, 'Clear'),
   249→    h('button', {
   250→      style: styles.actionButton,
   251→      'p-trigger': 'save-png',
   252→    }, 'Save PNG'),
   253→    h('button', {
   254→      style: styles.actionButton,
   255→      'p-trigger': 'save-project',
   256→    }, 'Save'),
   257→    h('button', {
   258→      style: styles.actionButton,
   259→      'p-trigger': 'load-project',
   260→    }, 'Load'),
   261→  )
   262→
   263→export const renderLayersPanel = (
   264→  layers: Array<{ id: string; name: string; visible: boolean }>,
   265→  activeLayerId: string,
   266→) =>
   267→  h('div', { style: styles.sidebar },
   268→    h('div', { style: styles.sidebarSection },
   269→      h('div', { style: styles.sidebarTitle }, 'Layers'),
   270→    ),
   271→    h('div', { style: styles.layerList },
   272→      ...([...layers].reverse().map((layer) =>
   273→        h('div', {
   274→          style: layer.id === activeLayerId ? styles.layerItemActive : styles.layerItem,
   275→          'p-trigger': `layer-select:${layer.id}`,
   276→        },
   277→          h('canvas', {
   278→            width: '40',
   279→            height: '30',
   280→            style: styles.layerThumbnail,
   281→            'p-target': `thumb-${layer.id}`,
   282→          }),
   283→          h('span', { style: styles.layerName }, layer.name),
   284→          h('button', {
   285→            style: styles.visibilityToggle,
   286→            'p-trigger': `layer-toggle:${layer.id}`,
   287→            title: layer.visible ? 'Hide layer' : 'Show layer',
   288→          }, layer.visible ? '\u{1F441}' : '\u{1F441}\u{200D}\u{1F5E8}'),
   289→        ),
   290→      )),
   291→    ),
   292→    h('div', { style: styles.layerActions },
   293→      h('button', {
   294→        style: styles.smallButton,
   295→        'p-trigger': 'layer-add',
   296→      }, '+ Add'),
   297→      h('button', {
   298→        style: styles.smallButton,
   299→        'p-trigger': 'layer-remove',
   300→      }, '- Remove'),
   301→    ),
   302→  )
   303→
   304→export const renderApp = (
   305→  canvasWidth: number,
   306→  canvasHeight: number,
   307→  activeTool: ToolType,
   308→  layers: Array<{ id: string; name: string; visible: boolean }>,
   309→  activeLayerId: string,
   310→  canUndo: boolean,
   311→  canRedo: boolean,
   312→) =>
   313→  h('div', { style: styles.container },
   314→    h('div', { style: styles.canvasArea },
   315→      renderToolbar(activeTool, canUndo, canRedo),
   316→      h('div', { style: styles.canvasWrapper },
   317→        h('canvas', {
   318→          width: String(canvasWidth),
   319→          height: String(canvasHeight),
   320→          style: styles.canvas,
   321→          'p-target': 'main-canvas',
   322→          'p-trigger': 'canvas-mousedown canvas-mousemove canvas-mouseup canvas-mouseleave',
   323→        }),
   324→      ),
   325→    ),
   326→    renderLayersPanel(layers, activeLayerId),
   327→  )
   328→
   329→export const renderPage = (
   330→  canvasWidth: number,
   331→  canvasHeight: number,
   332→) => {
   333→  const { render } = createSSR()
   334→  return render(
   335→    h('html', { lang: 'en' },
   336→      h('head', {},
   337→        h('meta', { charset: 'utf-8' }),
   338→        h('meta', { name: 'viewport', content: 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1' }),
   339→        h('title', {}, 'Drawing Canvas'),
   340→        h('style', {}, `
   341→          * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
   342→          body { overflow: hidden; }
   343→        `),
   344→      ),
   345→      h('body', {},
   346→        h('div', { id: 'app', 'p-target': 'app-root' }),
   347→        h('script', { type: 'module', src: '/client.ts' }),
   348→      ),
   349→    ),
   350→  )
   351→}

1→import { createDrawingCanvas } from './canvas'
     2→import type { ToolType, Point } from './types'
     3→
     4→const drawingCanvas = createDrawingCanvas(800, 600)
     5→
     6→let mainCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement | null = null
     7→let mainCtx: CanvasRenderingContext2D | null = null
     8→let isDrawing = false
     9→let animFrameId: number | null = null
    10→
    11→const getCanvasPoint = (e: MouseEvent): Point => {
    12→  if (!mainCanvas) return { x: 0, y: 0 }
    13→  const rect = mainCanvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    14→  const scaleX = mainCanvas.width / rect.width
    15→  const scaleY = mainCanvas.height / rect.height
    16→  return {
    17→    x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,
    18→    y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY,
    19→  }
    20→}
    21→
    22→const scheduleRender = (): void => {
    23→  if (animFrameId !== null) return
    24→  animFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    25→    animFrameId = null
    26→    if (mainCtx) {
    27→      drawingCanvas.renderToCanvas(mainCtx)
    28→    }
    29→    updateLayerThumbnails()
    30→  })
    31→}
    32→
    33→const updateLayerThumbnails = (): void => {
    34→  const state = drawingCanvas.getState()
    35→  for (const layer of state.layers) {
    36→    const thumbCanvas = document.querySelector(`[p-target="thumb-${layer.id}"]`) as HTMLCanvasElement | null
    37→    if (!thumbCanvas) continue
    38→    const thumbCtx = thumbCanvas.getContext('2d')
    39→    if (!thumbCtx) continue
    40→    drawingCanvas.renderLayerThumbnail(layer.id, thumbCtx, 40, 30)
    41→  }
    42→}
    43→
    44→const updateToolbarState = (): void => {
    45→  const activeTool = drawingCanvas.getTool()
    46→  const toolButtons = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('[p-trigger^="tool-select:"]')
    47→  toolButtons.forEach((btn) => {
    48→    const toolId = btn.getAttribute('p-trigger')?.split(':')[1]
    49→    if (toolId === activeTool) {
    50→      btn.style.backgroundColor = '#007acc'
    51→      btn.style.borderColor = '#007acc'
    52→      btn.style.color = '#ffffff'
    53→    } else {
    54→      btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3c3c3c'
    55→      btn.style.borderColor = '#555'
    56→      btn.style.color = '#e0e0e0'
    57→    }
    58→  })
    59→}
    60→
    61→const updateLayersPanel = (): void => {
    62→  const state = drawingCanvas.getState()
    63→  const layerList = document.querySelector('[p-target="layer-list"]')
    64→  if (!layerList) return
    65→
    66→  const items = document.querySelectorAll('[p-trigger^="layer-select:"]')
    67→  items.forEach((item) => {
    68→    const layerId = item.getAttribute('p-trigger')?.split(':')[1]
    69→    const el = item as HTMLElement
    70→    if (layerId === state.activeLayerId) {
    71→      el.style.backgroundColor = '#37373d'
    72→      el.style.border = '1px solid #007acc'
    73→    } else {
    74→      el.style.backgroundColor = 'transparent'
    75→      el.style.border = '1px solid transparent'
    76→    }
    77→  })
    78→}
    79→
    80→const rebuildUI = (): void => {
    81→  const state = drawingCanvas.getState()
    82→  const app = document.getElementById('app')
    83→  if (!app) return
    84→
    85→  app.innerHTML = ''
    86→
    87→  // Build container
    88→  const container = document.createElement('div')
    89→  container.style.cssText = 'display:flex;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;height:100vh;background:#1e1e1e;color:#e0e0e0;'
    90→
    91→  // Canvas area
    92→  const canvasArea = document.createElement('div')
    93→  canvasArea.style.cssText = 'flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;'
    94→
    95→  // Toolbar
    96→  const toolbar = buildToolbar()
    97→  canvasArea.appendChild(toolbar)
    98→
    99→  // Canvas wrapper
   100→  const canvasWrapper = document.createElement('div')
   101→  canvasWrapper.style.cssText = 'flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:auto;padding:20px;background:#1e1e1e;'
   102→
   103→  mainCanvas = document.createElement('canvas')
   104→  mainCanvas.width = state.width
   105→  mainCanvas.height = state.height
   106→  mainCanvas.style.cssText = 'border:1px solid #3c3c3c;cursor:crosshair;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);'
   107→  mainCtx = mainCanvas.getContext('2d')
   108→
   109→  mainCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown)
   110→  mainCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove)
   111→  mainCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp)
   112→  mainCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseUp)
   113→
   114→  canvasWrapper.appendChild(mainCanvas)
   115→  canvasArea.appendChild(canvasWrapper)
   116→  container.appendChild(canvasArea)
   117→
   118→  // Layers sidebar
   119→  const sidebar = buildLayersSidebar()
   120→  container.appendChild(sidebar)

   122→  app.appendChild(container)
   123→  scheduleRender()

   125→
   126→const buildToolbar = (): HTMLElement => {
   127→  const toolbar = document.createElement('div')
   128→  toolbar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:6px 12px;background:#333;border-bottom:1px solid #3c3c3c;flex-wrap:wrap;'
   129→
   130→  const toolDefs: Array<{ id: ToolType; label: string }> = [
   131→    { id: 'pen', label: 'Pen' },
   132→    { id: 'line', label: 'Line' },
   133→    { id: 'rectangle', label: 'Rect' },
   134→    { id: 'circle', label: 'Circle' },
   135→    { id: 'eraser', label: 'Eraser' },
   136→  ]
   137→
   138→  const activeTool = drawingCanvas.getTool()
   139→
   140→  for (const tool of toolDefs) {
   141→    const btn = document.createElement('button')
   142→    btn.textContent = tool.label
   143→    btn.title = tool.label
   144→    const isActive = tool.id === activeTool
   145→    btn.style.cssText = `padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid ${isActive ? '#007acc' : '#555'};border-radius:4px;background:${isActive ? '#007acc' : '#3c3c3c'};color:${isActive ? '#fff' : '#e0e0e0'};cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;`
   146→    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   147→      drawingCanvas.setTool(tool.id)
   148→      rebuildUI()
   149→    })
   150→    toolbar.appendChild(btn)
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  toolbar.appendChild(createSeparator())
   154→
   155→  // Color picker
   156→  const colorLabel = document.createElement('span')
   157→  colorLabel.textContent = 'Color:'
   158→  colorLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#aaa;margin-right:4px;'
   159→  toolbar.appendChild(colorLabel)
   160→
   161→  const colorInput = document.createElement('input')
   162→  colorInput.type = 'color'
   163→  colorInput.value = drawingCanvas.getColor()
   164→  colorInput.style.cssText = 'width:32px;height:32px;border:none;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;padding:0;background:transparent;'
   165→  colorInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
   166→    drawingCanvas.setColor((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value)
   167→  })
   168→  toolbar.appendChild(colorInput)
   169→
   170→  toolbar.appendChild(createSeparator())
   171→
   172→  // Brush size
   173→  const sizeLabel = document.createElement('span')
   174→  sizeLabel.textContent = 'Size:'
   175→  sizeLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#aaa;margin-right:4px;'
   176→  toolbar.appendChild(sizeLabel)
   177→
   178→  const sizeDisplay = document.createElement('span')
   179→  sizeDisplay.textContent = String(drawingCanvas.getBrushSize())
   180→  sizeDisplay.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#aaa;min-width:24px;'
   181→
   182→  const sizeInput = document.createElement('input')
   183→  sizeInput.type = 'range'
   184→  sizeInput.min = '1'
   185→  sizeInput.max = '50'
   186→  sizeInput.value = String(drawingCanvas.getBrushSize())
   187→  sizeInput.style.cssText = 'width:80px;accent-color:#007acc;'
   188→  sizeInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {

   190→    drawingCanvas.setBrushSize(val)
   191→    sizeDisplay.textContent = String(val)
   192→  })
   193→  toolbar.appendChild(sizeInput)
   194→  toolbar.appendChild(sizeDisplay)
   195→
   196→  toolbar.appendChild(createSeparator())
   197→
   198→  // Undo/Redo
   199→  toolbar.appendChild(
   200→    createActionButton('Undo', drawingCanvas.canUndo(), () => {
   201→      drawingCanvas.undo()
   202→      rebuildUI()
   203→    }),
   204→  )
   205→  toolbar.appendChild(
   206→    createActionButton('Redo', drawingCanvas.canRedo(), () => {
   207→      drawingCanvas.redo()
   208→      rebuildUI()
   209→    }),
   210→  )
   211→
   212→  toolbar.appendChild(createSeparator())
   213→
   214→  // Clear
   215→  toolbar.appendChild(
   216→    createActionButton('Clear', true, () => {
   217→      drawingCanvas.clearActiveLayer()
   218→      rebuildUI()
   219→    }),
   220→  )
   221→
   222→  // Save PNG
   223→  toolbar.appendChild(
   224→    createActionButton('Save PNG', true, async () => {
   225→      if (!mainCanvas) return

   232→
   233→  // Save project

   235→    createActionButton('Save', true, async () => {

   241→  )
   242→

   266→const createActionButton = (label: string, enabled: boolean, onClick: () => void): HTMLElement => {

   268→  btn.textContent = label

   271→    btn.addEventListener('click', onClick)
   272→  } else {
   273→    btn.style.cssText = 'padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid #444;border-radius:4px;background:#2d2d2d;color:#666;cursor:not-allowed;font-size:13px;'

   278→const buildLayersSidebar = (): HTMLElement => {

   290→  titleSection.appendChild(title)

   296→
   297→  const reversedLayers = [...state.layers].reverse()
   298→  for (const layer of reversedLayers) {

   300→    const item = document.createElement('div')
   301→    item.style.cssText = `display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;${isActive ? 'background:#37373d;border:1px solid #007acc;' : 'border:1px solid transparent;'}`
   302→
   303→    item.addEventListener('click', () => {

   305→      rebuildUI()

   307→
   308→    // Thumbnail

The module is complete. Here's the final structure:

**Core modules:**
- `types.ts` — Type definitions (ToolType, Point, DrawAction, Layer, CanvasState, etc.)
- `layers.ts` — Layer CRUD operations (add, remove, toggle visibility, reorder, rename)
- `history.ts` — Snapshot-based undo/redo with configurable max depth
- `canvas.ts` — Main `createDrawingCanvas` controller with all drawing tools, rendering, and persistence integration
- `storage.ts` — Bun-based persistence (save/load projects as JSON, export/import PNG)

**UI modules:**
- `render.ts` — Plaited template-based UI (toolbar, layers panel with thumbnails, SSR page shell)
- `client.ts` — Browser-side event handling, DOM management, keyboard shortcuts (Cmd/Ctrl+Z, Shift for redo)
- `server.ts` — Bun dev server with on-the-fly TS transpilation

**Entry points:**
- `index.ts` — Module entry that re-exports all public APIs
- `renderer.ts` — Standalone canvas rendering helpers (for use outside the controller)
- `persistence.ts` / `ui.ts` — Convenience re-exports

**Features:**
- Freehand pen drawing with smoothing
- Shape tools: rectangle, circle, line
- Color picker and adjustable brush size (1–50)
- Eraser tool (uses `destination-out` compositing)
- Undo/redo (50 levels, keyboard shortcuts)
- Clear active layer
- Layers panel with canvas-based thumbnails and visibility toggles
- Save/load projects as JSON, export/import PNG
- Dark theme UI with VS Code-inspired styling

trials.output:
Everything looks good. Here's a summary of what the module contains and what I fixed:

**Module: `@node/drawing-canvas`**

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module config with MSS tags (`art` / `form` / `none`)
- `skills/drawing-canvas/SKILL.md` — Seed skill description
- `types.ts` — Type definitions (`ToolKind`, `Point`, `StrokeAction`, `ShapeAction`, `Layer`, `CanvasState`, etc.)
- `canvas.ts` — Core canvas state management (create, begin/continue/finish strokes and shapes)
- `tools.ts` — Tool actions (set tool, colors, brush size, clear layer)
- `layers.ts` — Layer CRUD (add, remove, toggle visibility, reorder, select)
- `history.ts` — Undo/redo with action-based history stack
- `renderer.ts` — SVG rendering engine (strokes as paths, shapes as SVG primitives, quadratic curve smoothing, layer thumbnails)
- `view.ts` — UI rendering with plaited `h()` — toolbar, tools panel, color picker, layers panel with thumbnails
- `storage.ts` — Persistence (save/load JSON state, PNG export/thumbnails via `sharp`)
- `index.ts` — Public API facade (`createDrawingCanvas`)
- `data/` — Persistent storage directory

**Bugs fixed:**
1. **PNG export was fake** — was saving SVG with `.svg` extension; now uses `sharp` to convert SVG to actual PNG
2. **Shape drawing broken** — `draw()` wasn't tracking the end point, so shapes were zero-sized; added `shapeEnd` tracking
3. **File deletion** — was writing empty strings; now uses `fs/promises.unlink`

5. **Button label** — "Export SVG" changed to "Export PNG"
6. **`clearAll` fragility** — was mutating active layer during iteration; now maps all layers to empty actions in one pass

---
name: drawing-canvas
description: Freehand drawing canvas with shapes, layers, color picker, and PNG export
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: form
  boundary: none
  scale: "2"
---

# Drawing Canvas

A feature-rich drawing canvas module for creating freehand art and simple shapes.

## Features

- **Freehand drawing** with adjustable brush size
- **Shape tools**: rectangle, circle, and line
- **Color picker** for stroke and fill colors
- **Eraser tool** with adjustable size
- **Undo / Redo** history stack
- **Clear canvas** to start fresh
- **Layers panel** with thumbnails and visibility toggles
- **Save** drawings as PNG files
- **Load** existing PNG files back onto the canvas

## Usage

1. Select a tool from the toolbar (pen, rectangle, circle, line, eraser).
2. Pick a color using the color picker.
3. Adjust brush size with the slider.
4. Draw on the canvas — each stroke is recorded for undo/redo.
5. Use the layers panel to manage drawing layers, toggle visibility, and reorder.
6. Save your work as PNG, or load a previous drawing.

     4→import { pushToHistory } from './history'

     6→export const createCanvasState = (width = 800, height = 600): CanvasState => {
     7→  const baseLayer = createLayer('Background')
     8→  return {
     9→    width,
    10→    height,
    11→    layers: [baseLayer],
    12→    activeLayerId: baseLayer.id,
    13→    activeTool: 'pen',
    14→    strokeColor: '#000000',
    15→    fillColor: null,
    16→    brushSize: 3,
    17→    history: [],
    18→    redoStack: [],
    19→  }
    20→}
    21→
    22→export const beginStroke = (
    23→  state: CanvasState,
    24→  point: Point,
    25→): { state: CanvasState; currentPoints: Point[] } => {
    26→  return { state, currentPoints: [point] }
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const continueStroke = (
    30→  currentPoints: Point[],
    31→  point: Point,
    32→): Point[] => {
    33→  return [...currentPoints, point]
    34→}
    35→
    36→export const finishStroke = (
    37→  state: CanvasState,
    38→  points: Point[],
    39→): CanvasState => {
    40→  if (points.length === 0) return state
    41→
    42→  const tool = state.activeTool === 'eraser' ? 'eraser' as const : 'pen' as const
    43→  const action = createStrokeAction(
    44→    points,
    45→    state.strokeColor,
    46→    state.brushSize,
    47→    tool,
    48→    state.activeLayerId,
    49→  )
    50→
    51→  const newState = addActionToLayer(state, action)
    52→  return pushToHistory(newState, [action])
    53→}
    54→
    55→export const finishShape = (
    56→  state: CanvasState,
    57→  start: Point,
    58→  end: Point,
    59→): CanvasState => {

    61→  const action = createShapeAction(
    62→    tool,

    70→

    72→  return pushToHistory(newState, [action])

1→import type { DrawAction, CanvasState } from './types'
     2→
     3→export const pushToHistory = (state: CanvasState, actions: DrawAction[]): CanvasState => ({
     4→  ...state,
     5→  history: [...state.history, actions],
     6→  redoStack: [],
     7→})
     8→
     9→export const undo = (state: CanvasState): CanvasState => {
    10→  if (state.history.length === 0) return state
    11→
    12→  const lastActions = state.history[state.history.length - 1]
    13→  const newHistory = state.history.slice(0, -1)
    14→
    15→  const newLayers = state.layers.map((layer) => {
    16→    const actionsToRemove = lastActions.filter((a) => a.kind !== 'clear' ? a.layerId === layer.id : a.layerId === layer.id)
    17→    if (actionsToRemove.length === 0) return layer
    18→
    19→    return {
    20→      ...layer,
    21→      actions: layer.actions.slice(0, layer.actions.length - actionsToRemove.length),
    22→    }
    23→  })
    24→
    25→  return {
    26→    ...state,
    27→    layers: newLayers,
    28→    history: newHistory,
    29→    redoStack: [...state.redoStack, lastActions],
    30→  }
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const redo = (state: CanvasState): CanvasState => {
    34→  if (state.redoStack.length === 0) return state
    35→
    36→  const nextActions = state.redoStack[state.redoStack.length - 1]
    37→  const newRedoStack = state.redoStack.slice(0, -1)
    38→
    39→  const newLayers = state.layers.map((layer) => {
    40→    const actionsToAdd = nextActions.filter((a) => a.kind !== 'clear' ? a.layerId === layer.id : a.layerId === layer.id)
    41→    if (actionsToAdd.length === 0) return layer
    42→
    43→    return {
    44→      ...layer,
    45→      actions: [...layer.actions, ...actionsToAdd],
    46→    }
    47→  })
    48→
    49→  return {
    50→    ...state,
    51→    layers: newLayers,
    52→    history: [...state.history, nextActions],
    53→    redoStack: newRedoStack,
    54→  }
    55→}
    56→

1→import type { Layer, CanvasState } from './types'
     2→
     3→let layerCounter = 0
     4→
     5→export const createLayer = (name?: string): Layer => {
     6→  layerCounter += 1
     7→  return {
     8→    id: `layer-${layerCounter}-${Date.now()}`,
     9→    name: name ?? `Layer ${layerCounter}`,
    10→    visible: true,
    11→    opacity: 1,
    12→    actions: [],
    13→  }
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const addLayer = (state: CanvasState, name?: string): CanvasState => {
    17→  const layer = createLayer(name)
    18→  return {
    19→    ...state,
    20→    layers: [...state.layers, layer],
    21→    activeLayerId: layer.id,
    22→  }
    23→}
    24→
    25→export const removeLayer = (state: CanvasState, layerId: string): CanvasState => {
    26→  if (state.layers.length <= 1) return state
    27→
    28→  const filtered = state.layers.filter((l) => l.id !== layerId)
    29→  const activeLayerId = state.activeLayerId === layerId
    30→    ? filtered[filtered.length - 1].id
    31→    : state.activeLayerId
    32→
    33→  return { ...state, layers: filtered, activeLayerId }
    34→}
    35→
    36→export const toggleLayerVisibility = (state: CanvasState, layerId: string): CanvasState => ({
    37→  ...state,
    38→  layers: state.layers.map((l) =>
    39→    l.id === layerId ? { ...l, visible: !l.visible } : l
    40→  ),
    41→})
    42→
    43→export const setActiveLayer = (state: CanvasState, layerId: string): CanvasState => ({
    44→  ...state,
    45→  activeLayerId: layerId,
    46→})
    47→
    48→export const reorderLayers = (state: CanvasState, fromIndex: number, toIndex: number): CanvasState => {
    49→  const layers = [...state.layers]
    50→  const [moved] = layers.splice(fromIndex, 1)
    51→  layers.splice(toIndex, 0, moved)
    52→  return { ...state, layers }
    53→}

1→import type { CanvasState, DrawingMetadata, Layer } from './types'
     2→import { renderCanvasToSVG } from './renderer'
     3→
     4→const DATA_DIR = './data'
     5→const DRAWINGS_INDEX = `${DATA_DIR}/drawings.json`
     6→
     7→const ensureDataDir = async () => {
     8→  const dir = Bun.file(DATA_DIR)
     9→  try {
    10→    await Bun.write(`${DATA_DIR}/.gitkeep`, '')
    11→  } catch {
    12→    // directory exists
    13→  }
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const loadDrawingsIndex = async (): Promise<DrawingMetadata[]> => {
    17→  const file = Bun.file(DRAWINGS_INDEX)
    18→  if (!(await file.exists())) return []
    19→
    20→  const text = await file.text()
    21→  return JSON.parse(text) as DrawingMetadata[]
    22→}
    23→
    24→const saveDrawingsIndex = async (drawings: DrawingMetadata[]) => {
    25→  await Bun.write(DRAWINGS_INDEX, JSON.stringify(drawings, null, 2))
    26→}
    27→
    28→export const saveDrawing = async (
    29→  state: CanvasState,
    30→  name: string,
    31→  existingId?: string,
    32→): Promise<DrawingMetadata> => {
    33→  await ensureDataDir()
    34→
    35→  const id = existingId ?? `drawing-${Date.now()}`
    36→  const now = new Date().toISOString()
    37→
    38→  const dataPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.json`
    39→  const svgPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.svg`
    40→  const thumbnailPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}-thumb.svg`
    41→
    42→  const saveData = {
    43→    width: state.width,
    44→    height: state.height,
    45→    layers: state.layers,
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  await Bun.write(dataPath, JSON.stringify(saveData, null, 2))
    49→
    50→  const svg = renderCanvasToSVG(state.layers, state.width, state.height)
    51→  await Bun.write(svgPath, svg)
    52→
    53→  const thumbSvg = renderCanvasToSVG(state.layers, state.width, state.height)
    54→  await Bun.write(thumbnailPath, thumbSvg)
    55→
    56→  const metadata: DrawingMetadata = {
    57→    id,
    58→    name,
    59→    createdAt: existingId ? (await getDrawingMetadata(id))?.createdAt ?? now : now,
    60→    updatedAt: now,
    61→    width: state.width,
    62→    height: state.height,
    63→    thumbnailPath,
    64→    dataPath,
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
    68→  const existingIndex = drawings.findIndex((d) => d.id === id)
    69→  if (existingIndex >= 0) {
    70→    drawings[existingIndex] = metadata
    71→  } else {
    72→    drawings.push(metadata)
    73→  }
    74→
    75→  await saveDrawingsIndex(drawings)
    76→  return metadata
    77→}
    78→
    79→const getDrawingMetadata = async (id: string): Promise<DrawingMetadata | undefined> => {
    80→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
    81→  return drawings.find((d) => d.id === id)
    82→}
    83→
    84→export const loadDrawing = async (id: string): Promise<{ layers: Layer[]; width: number; height: number } | null> => {
    85→  const metadata = await getDrawingMetadata(id)
    86→  if (!metadata) return null
    87→
    88→  const file = Bun.file(metadata.dataPath)
    89→  if (!(await file.exists())) return null
    90→
    91→  const text = await file.text()
    92→  return JSON.parse(text)
    93→}
    94→
    95→export const deleteDrawing = async (id: string): Promise<boolean> => {
    96→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
    97→  const drawing = drawings.find((d) => d.id === id)
    98→  if (!drawing) return false
    99→
   100→  const filesToDelete = [drawing.dataPath, drawing.thumbnailPath, `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.svg`]
   101→
   102→  for (const filePath of filesToDelete) {
   103→    try {
   104→      const file = Bun.file(filePath)
   105→      if (await file.exists()) {
   106→        await Bun.write(filePath, '')
   107→      }
   108→    } catch {
   109→      // file doesn't exist
   110→    }
   111→  }
   112→
   113→  const remaining = drawings.filter((d) => d.id !== id)
   114→  await saveDrawingsIndex(remaining)
   115→  return true
   116→}
   117→
   118→export const exportAsPNG = async (state: CanvasState): Promise<string> => {

   120→  const pngPath = `${DATA_DIR}/export-${Date.now()}.svg`

1→import type { DrawAction, Point, Layer } from './types'
     2→
     3→export const renderActionToSVGPath = (action: DrawAction): string => {
     4→  if (action.kind === 'clear') return ''
     5→
     6→  if (action.kind === 'stroke') {
     7→    if (action.points.length === 0) return ''
     8→
     9→    const isEraser = action.tool === 'eraser'
    10→    const strokeColor = isEraser ? '#ffffff' : action.color
    11→    const pathData = pointsToPathData(action.points)
    12→
    13→    return `<path d="${pathData}" stroke="${strokeColor}" stroke-width="${action.size}" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />`
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  if (action.kind === 'shape') {
    17→    const fill = action.fillColor ?? 'none'
    18→
    19→    switch (action.tool) {
    20→      case 'rectangle': {
    21→        const x = Math.min(action.start.x, action.end.x)
    22→        const y = Math.min(action.start.y, action.end.y)
    23→        const w = Math.abs(action.end.x - action.start.x)
    24→        const ht = Math.abs(action.end.y - action.start.y)
    25→        return `<rect x="${x}" y="${y}" width="${w}" height="${ht}" stroke="${action.color}" stroke-width="${action.size}" fill="${fill}" />`
    26→      }
    27→      case 'circle': {
    28→        const cx = (action.start.x + action.end.x) / 2
    29→        const cy = (action.start.y + action.end.y) / 2
    30→        const rx = Math.abs(action.end.x - action.start.x) / 2
    31→        const ry = Math.abs(action.end.y - action.start.y) / 2
    32→        return `<ellipse cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" rx="${rx}" ry="${ry}" stroke="${action.color}" stroke-width="${action.size}" fill="${fill}" />`
    33→      }
    34→      case 'line':
    35→        return `<line x1="${action.start.x}" y1="${action.start.y}" x2="${action.end.x}" y2="${action.end.y}" stroke="${action.color}" stroke-width="${action.size}" stroke-linecap="round" />`
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  return ''
    40→}
    41→
    42→const pointsToPathData = (points: Point[]): string => {
    43→  if (points.length === 0) return ''
    44→  if (points.length === 1) {
    45→    return `M ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y} L ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  let d = `M ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`
    49→
    50→  for (let i = 1; i < points.length - 1; i++) {
    51→    const midX = (points[i].x + points[i + 1].x) / 2
    52→    const midY = (points[i].y + points[i + 1].y) / 2
    53→    d += ` Q ${points[i].x} ${points[i].y} ${midX} ${midY}`
    54→  }
    55→
    56→  const last = points[points.length - 1]
    57→  d += ` L ${last.x} ${last.y}`
    58→
    59→  return d
    60→}
    61→
    62→export const renderLayerToSVG = (layer: Layer, width: number, height: number): string => {
    63→  if (!layer.visible) return ''
    64→
    65→  const elements = layer.actions.map(renderActionToSVGPath).join('\n    ')
    66→  return `<g opacity="${layer.opacity}">\n    ${elements}\n  </g>`
    67→}
    68→
    69→export const renderCanvasToSVG = (layers: Layer[], width: number, height: number): string => {
    70→  const layerContent = layers.map((l) => renderLayerToSVG(l, width, height)).join('\n  ')
    71→
    72→  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${width}" height="${height}" viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}">
    73→  <rect width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="white" />
    74→  ${layerContent}
    75→</svg>`
    76→}
    77→
    78→export const renderLayerThumbnail = (layer: Layer, width: number, height: number, thumbSize: number = 48): string => {
    79→  const scale = thumbSize / Math.max(width, height)
    80→  const thumbW = Math.round(width * scale)
    81→  const thumbH = Math.round(height * scale)
    82→
    83→  const elements = layer.actions.map(renderActionToSVGPath).join('\n    ')
    84→
    85→  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${thumbW}" height="${thumbH}" viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}">
    86→  <rect width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="white" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="2" />
    87→  <g opacity="${layer.opacity}">
    88→    ${elements}
    89→  </g>
    90→</svg>`
    91→}
    92→

     9→export type DrawingCanvas = {
    10→  getState: () => CanvasState
    11→  render: () => ReturnType<typeof renderCanvasView>
    12→
    13→  // Tool selection
    14→  selectTool: (tool: ToolKind) => void
    15→  setStrokeColor: (color: string) => void
    16→  setFillColor: (color: string | null) => void

    30→  clearAll: () => void
    31→
    32→  // Layer management

    34→  removeLayer: (layerId: string) => void
    35→  toggleLayerVisibility: (layerId: string) => void
    36→  selectLayer: (layerId: string) => void
    37→  reorderLayers: (fromIndex: number, toIndex: number) => void
    38→
    39→  // Persistence
    40→  save: (name: string, existingId?: string) => Promise<ReturnType<typeof saveDrawing>>
    41→  load: (id: string) => Promise<boolean>
    42→  listDrawings: () => Promise<ReturnType<typeof loadDrawingsIndex>>
    43→  deleteDrawing: (id: string) => Promise<boolean>
    44→  exportSVG: () => Promise<string>
    45→}
    46→
    47→export const createDrawingCanvas = (width = 800, height = 600): DrawingCanvas => {
    48→  let state = createCanvasState(width, height)
    49→  let currentPoints: Point[] = []
    50→  let shapeStart: Point | null = null
    51→  let isDrawing = false
    52→
    53→  const canvas: DrawingCanvas = {
    54→    getState: () => state,
    55→    render: () => renderCanvasView(state),
    56→
    57→    selectTool: (tool) => {
    58→      state = setTool(state, tool)
    59→    },
    60→
    61→    setStrokeColor: (color) => {
    62→      state = setStrokeColor(state, color)
    63→    },
    64→
    65→    setFillColor: (color) => {
    66→      state = setFillColor(state, color)
    67→    },
    68→
    69→    setBrushSize: (size) => {
    70→      state = setBrushSize(state, size)
    71→    },
    72→
    73→    startDrawing: (point) => {
    74→      isDrawing = true
    75→      if (isStrokeTool(state.activeTool)) {
    76→        const result = beginStroke(state, point)
    77→        state = result.state
    78→        currentPoints = result.currentPoints
    79→      } else if (isShapeTool(state.activeTool)) {
    80→        shapeStart = point
    81→      }
    82→    },
    83→
    84→    draw: (point) => {
    85→      if (!isDrawing) return
    86→      if (isStrokeTool(state.activeTool)) {
    87→        currentPoints = continueStroke(currentPoints, point)
    88→      }
    89→    },
    90→
    91→    stopDrawing: () => {
    92→      if (!isDrawing) return
    93→      isDrawing = false
    94→
    95→      if (isStrokeTool(state.activeTool) && currentPoints.length > 0) {
    96→        state = finishStroke(state, currentPoints)
    97→        currentPoints = []
    98→      } else if (isShapeTool(state.activeTool) && shapeStart) {
    99→        // If no end point, use shapeStart as both
   100→        state = finishShape(state, shapeStart, shapeStart)
   101→        shapeStart = null
   102→      }
   103→    },
   104→
   105→    undo: () => {
   106→      state = undo(state)
   107→    },
   108→
   109→    redo: () => {
   110→      state = redo(state)
   111→    },
   112→
   113→    clearLayer: () => {
   114→      state = clearActiveLayer(state)
   115→    },
   116→
   117→    clearAll: () => {
   118→      for (const layer of state.layers) {
   119→        state = setActiveLayer(state, layer.id)
   120→        state = clearActiveLayer(state)
   121→      }
   122→      state = setActiveLayer(state, state.layers[0].id)
   123→    },
   124→
   125→    addLayer: (name) => {
   126→      state = addLayer(state, name)
   127→    },
   128→
   129→    removeLayer: (layerId) => {
   130→      state = removeLayer(state, layerId)
   131→    },
   132→
   133→    toggleLayerVisibility: (layerId) => {
   134→      state = toggleLayerVisibility(state, layerId)
   135→    },
   136→
   137→    selectLayer: (layerId) => {
   138→      state = setActiveLayer(state, layerId)
   139→    },
   140→
   141→    reorderLayers: (fromIndex, toIndex) => {
   142→      state = reorderLayers(state, fromIndex, toIndex)
   143→    },
   144→
   145→    save: async (name, existingId) => {
   146→      return saveDrawing(state, name, existingId)
   147→    },
   148→
   149→    load: async (id) => {
   150→      const data = await loadDrawing(id)
   151→      if (!data) return false
   152→
   153→      state = {
   154→        ...state,
   155→        width: data.width,
   156→        height: data.height,
   157→        layers: data.layers,
   158→        activeLayerId: data.layers[0]?.id ?? state.activeLayerId,
   159→        history: [],
   160→        redoStack: [],
   161→      }
   162→      return true
   163→    },
   164→
   165→    listDrawings: () => loadDrawingsIndex(),
   166→
   167→    deleteDrawing: (id) => deleteDrawing(id),
   168→
   169→    exportSVG: () => exportAsPNG(state),
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  return canvas
   173→}
   174→
   175→// Re-export types
   176→export type { CanvasState, ToolKind, Point, Layer, DrawAction } from './types'
   177→export { createCanvasState } from './canvas'
   178→export { renderCanvasView, renderCanvasToSVG } from './view'

trajectory.content:
Good, the module already exists with a fairly complete structure. Let me review the issues I see:

1. The `exportAsPNG` function in `storage.ts` actually exports SVG, not PNG. The function name is misleading and the path says `.svg`. It needs to actually export as PNG.
2. There's no actual PNG export support - just SVG rendering.
3. The `renderCanvasToSVG` import in `view.ts` references from `./renderer` but the export in `index.ts` says `export { renderCanvasView, renderCanvasToSVG } from './view'` - but `renderCanvasToSVG` is not defined in `view.ts`, it's in `renderer.ts`.


4. The `stopDrawing` method doesn't properly handle shape end points. When a shape tool is used and `stopDrawing` is called, it uses `shapeStart` as both start and end, which means the shape ends up zero-sized.
5. The `deleteDrawing` function just clears the file content instead of actually removing it.
6. The `clearAll` function modifies the active layer while iterating, which could cause issues.

I need to address these problems: implement proper PNG export functionality, fix the shape endpoint handling so shapes have actual dimensions, replace the file clearing approach with actual deletion, and refactor `clearAll` to avoid modifying state during iteration.

For PNG conversion, I'm thinking about the best approach in a Bun environment. Since the drawings are stored as SVG, I could use a library like `sharp` or `resvg` to convert them, but that adds external dependencies. Alternatively, I could leverage Bun's subprocess capabilities to handle the conversion, or just save the SVG with a PNG extension and document that limitation.

Looking at the core issues more carefully, the main problems are that the PNG export isn't actually producing PNG files, the shape drawing doesn't properly track the endpoint during mouse movement, file deletion uses write instead of unlink, and the View.ts exports aren't complete. Let me prioritize fixing these actual bugs rather than adding new dependencies, then consider the PNG conversion approach afterward.

The module structure is already in place. I see several issues to fix:

1. **PNG export is fake** — `exportAsPNG` just saves SVG with a `.svg` extension
2. **Shape drawing is broken** — `stopDrawing` uses `shapeStart` as both start and end (zero-sized shape)
3. **File deletion** writes empty strings instead of actually deleting
4. **Re-export mismatch** — `index.ts` exports `renderCanvasToSVG` from `./view` but it lives in `./renderer`
5. **Export button says "Export SVG"** but feature spec says PNG

Let me fix all of these.

1→import type { CanvasState, DrawingMetadata, Layer } from './types'
     2→import { renderCanvasToSVG } from './renderer'
     3→import sharp from 'sharp'
     4→
     5→const DATA_DIR = './data'
     6→const DRAWINGS_INDEX = `${DATA_DIR}/drawings.json`
     7→
     8→const ensureDataDir = async () => {
     9→  const dir = Bun.file(DATA_DIR)
    10→  try {
    11→    await Bun.write(`${DATA_DIR}/.gitkeep`, '')
    12→  } catch {
    13→    // directory exists
    14→  }
    15→}
    16→
    17→export const loadDrawingsIndex = async (): Promise<DrawingMetadata[]> => {
    18→  const file = Bun.file(DRAWINGS_INDEX)
    19→  if (!(await file.exists())) return []
    20→
    21→  const text = await file.text()
    22→  return JSON.parse(text) as DrawingMetadata[]
    23→}
    24→
    25→const saveDrawingsIndex = async (drawings: DrawingMetadata[]) => {
    26→  await Bun.write(DRAWINGS_INDEX, JSON.stringify(drawings, null, 2))
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const saveDrawing = async (
    30→  state: CanvasState,
    31→  name: string,
    32→  existingId?: string,
    33→): Promise<DrawingMetadata> => {
    34→  await ensureDataDir()
    35→
    36→  const id = existingId ?? `drawing-${Date.now()}`
    37→  const now = new Date().toISOString()
    38→
    39→  const dataPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.json`
    40→  const pngPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.png`
    41→  const thumbnailPath = `${DATA_DIR}/${id}-thumb.png`
    42→
    43→  const saveData = {
    44→    width: state.width,
    45→    height: state.height,
    46→    layers: state.layers,
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  await Bun.write(dataPath, JSON.stringify(saveData, null, 2))
    50→
    51→  const svg = renderCanvasToSVG(state.layers, state.width, state.height)
    52→  const svgBuffer = Buffer.from(svg)
    53→  const pngBuffer = await sharp(svgBuffer).png().toBuffer()
    54→  await Bun.write(pngPath, pngBuffer)
    55→
    56→  const thumbBuffer = await sharp(svgBuffer).resize(96, 72, { fit: 'inside' }).png().toBuffer()
    57→  await Bun.write(thumbnailPath, thumbBuffer)
    58→
    59→  const metadata: DrawingMetadata = {
    60→    id,
    61→    name,
    62→    createdAt: existingId ? (await getDrawingMetadata(id))?.createdAt ?? now : now,
    63→    updatedAt: now,
    64→    width: state.width,
    65→    height: state.height,
    66→    thumbnailPath,
    67→    dataPath,
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
    71→  const existingIndex = drawings.findIndex((d) => d.id === id)
    72→  if (existingIndex >= 0) {
    73→    drawings[existingIndex] = metadata
    74→  } else {
    75→    drawings.push(metadata)
    76→  }
    77→
    78→  await saveDrawingsIndex(drawings)
    79→  return metadata
    80→}
    81→
    82→const getDrawingMetadata = async (id: string): Promise<DrawingMetadata | undefined> => {
    83→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
    84→  return drawings.find((d) => d.id === id)
    85→}
    86→
    87→export const loadDrawing = async (id: string): Promise<{ layers: Layer[]; width: number; height: number } | null> => {
    88→  const metadata = await getDrawingMetadata(id)
    89→  if (!metadata) return null
    90→
    91→  const file = Bun.file(metadata.dataPath)
    92→  if (!(await file.exists())) return null
    93→
    94→  const text = await file.text()
    95→  return JSON.parse(text)
    96→}
    97→
    98→export const deleteDrawing = async (id: string): Promise<boolean> => {
    99→  const drawings = await loadDrawingsIndex()
   100→  const drawing = drawings.find((d) => d.id === id)
   101→  if (!drawing) return false
   102→
   103→  const filesToDelete = [drawing.dataPath, drawing.thumbnailPath, `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.svg`, `${DATA_DIR}/${id}.png`]
   104→
   105→  for (const filePath of filesToDelete) {
   106→    try {
   107→      const { unlink } = await import('node:fs/promises')
   108→      await unlink(filePath)
   109→    } catch {
   110→      // file doesn't exist
   111→    }
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  const remaining = drawings.filter((d) => d.id !== id)
   115→  await saveDrawingsIndex(remaining)
   116→  return true
   117→}
   118→
   119→export const exportAsPNG = async (state: CanvasState): Promise<string> => {
   120→  await ensureDataDir()
   121→  const svg = renderCanvasToSVG(state.layers, state.width, state.height)
   122→  const svgBuffer = Buffer.from(svg)
   123→  const pngBuffer = await sharp(svgBuffer).png().toBuffer()
   124→  const pngPath = `${DATA_DIR}/export-${Date.now()}.png`
   125→  await Bun.write(pngPath, pngBuffer)
   126→  return pngPath
   127→}
   128→
   129→export const loadPNG = async (pngPath: string): Promise<{ width: number; height: number } | null> => {
   130→  const file = Bun.file(pngPath)
   131→  if (!(await file.exists())) return null
   132→  const metadata = await sharp(pngPath).metadata()
   133→  return { width: metadata.width ?? 800, height: metadata.height ?? 600 }
   134→}
   135→

trajectory.content:
Everything looks good. Here's a summary of what the module contains and what I fixed:

**Module: `@node/drawing-canvas`**

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module config with MSS tags (`art` / `form` / `none`)
- `skills/drawing-canvas/SKILL.md` — Seed skill description
- `types.ts` — Type definitions (`ToolKind`, `Point`, `StrokeAction`, `ShapeAction`, `Layer`, `CanvasState`, etc.)
- `canvas.ts` — Core canvas state management (create, begin/continue/finish strokes and shapes)
- `tools.ts` — Tool actions (set tool, colors, brush size, clear layer)
- `layers.ts` — Layer CRUD (add, remove, toggle visibility, reorder, select)
- `history.ts` — Undo/redo with action-based history stack
- `renderer.ts` — SVG rendering engine (strokes as paths, shapes as SVG primitives, quadratic curve smoothing, layer thumbnails)
- `view.ts` — UI rendering with plaited `h()` — toolbar, tools panel, color picker, layers panel with thumbnails
- `storage.ts` — Persistence (save/load JSON state, PNG export/thumbnails via `sharp`)
- `index.ts` — Public API facade (`createDrawingCanvas`)
- `data/` — Persistent storage directory

**Bugs fixed:**
1. **PNG export was fake** — was saving SVG with `.svg` extension; now uses `sharp` to convert SVG to actual PNG
2. **Shape drawing broken** — `draw()` wasn't tracking the end point, so shapes were zero-sized; added `shapeEnd` tracking
3. **File deletion** — was writing empty strings; now uses `fs/promises.unlink`
4. **Re-export mismatch** — `renderCanvasToSVG` was exported from `./view` but defined in `./renderer`; fixed
5. **Button label** — "Export SVG" changed to "Export PNG"
6. **`clearAll` fragility** — was mutating active layer during iteration; now maps all layers to empty actions in one pass

input: Create a Newton's laws simulator module. It should include three interactive simulations: (1) a simple pendulum showing oscillation with adjustable length and gravity, (2) a projectile motion simulator with adjustable angle and initial velocity showing trajectory path, and (3) a spring-mass system with adjustable spring constant and mass. Display real-time values for position, velocity, and acceleration. Include play/pause/reset controls and speed adjustment.
hint: Use RK4 numerical integration for pendulum and spring-mass (spring-mass oscillation: angular frequency ω = Math.sqrt(k/m), period T = 2π/ω). Analytical solution for projectile (x = v0*cos(a)*t, y = v0*sin(a)*t - 0.5*g*t^2). Render with server-side SVG using plaited h() templates. Client-side animation loop via requestAnimationFrame with physics inlined for 60fps. Store simulation parameters in data/presets.json. Separate concerns: types.ts (state/params/vectors), physics.ts (oscillation engines for pendulum, spring-mass), renderer.ts (SVG), simulation.ts (play/pause/reset/speed/tick), client.ts (animation loop + DOM events). MSS: contentType science, structure steps, mechanics track+chart, boundary all, scale 2.

trials.output:
The module is complete. Here's what it contains:

**Module structure:**
- `package.json` — modnet config (`science` / `steps` / `chart` / `all` / scale 2)
- `skills/newton-sim/SKILL.md` — skill descriptor with usage docs
- `data/presets.json` — default parameter presets

**Source files:**
- `src/types.ts` — Strict types for all three simulations, params, and state
- `src/physics.ts` — RK4 integration for pendulum & spring, analytical projectile motion
- `src/simulation.ts` — State engine with play/pause/reset, speed control, param updates
- `src/renderer.ts` — Server-side rendering via plaited `h()` for SSR
- `src/client.ts` — Client-side runtime (inlined `<script>`) with full animation loop
- `src/index.ts` — Bun HTTP server serving the interactive page

**Three simulations:**
1. **Pendulum** — RK4-integrated `θ'' = -(g/L)sin(θ) - bω`, with angle arc, velocity vector arrow, and KE/PE energy bars
2. **Projectile** — Analytical trajectory with trail polyline, velocity vector arrow, range/max-height labels
3. **Spring-Mass** — RK4-integrated `x'' = -(k/m)x - bv`, with zigzag spring visualization, KE/PE energy bars

**Controls:** Play/Pause/Reset buttons, speed selector (0.25x–4x), parameter sliders per simulation (including damping for pendulum & spring)

**Real-time display:** Position, velocity, acceleration, angular values, kinetic/potential energy — all updating at 60fps

    19→  springConstant: number      // N/m (1–50)
    20→  mass: number                // kg (0.5–10)
    21→  initialDisplacement: number // meters (0.1–1.0)
    22→  damping: number             // coefficient (0–0.5)
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type SimulationParams = PendulumParams | ProjectileParams | SpringParams
    26→
    27→export type Vec2 = { x: number; y: number }
    28→
    29→export type PendulumState = {
    30→  angle: number          // radians
    31→  angularVelocity: number
    32→  angularAcceleration: number
    33→  position: Vec2         // bob position in meters
    34→  velocity: number       // linear velocity magnitude
    35→  acceleration: number   // linear acceleration magnitude
    36→  kineticEnergy: number
    37→  potentialEnergy: number
    38→  time: number
    39→}
    40→
    41→export type ProjectileState = {
    42→  position: Vec2
    43→  velocity: Vec2
    44→  acceleration: Vec2
    45→  speed: number
    46→  time: number
    47→  kineticEnergy: number
    48→  potentialEnergy: number
    49→  trail: Vec2[]          // trajectory path points
    50→  landed: boolean
    51→}
    52→
    53→export type SpringState = {
    54→  displacement: number   // meters from equilibrium
    55→  velocity: number
    56→  acceleration: number
    57→  time: number
    58→  kineticEnergy: number
    59→  potentialEnergy: number
    60→}
    61→
    62→export type SimulationState = {
    63→  type: SimulationType
    64→  playback: PlaybackState
    65→  speed: number          // multiplier (0.25–4.0)
    66→  pendulum: { params: PendulumParams; state: PendulumState }
    67→  projectile: { params: ProjectileParams; state: ProjectileState }
    68→  spring: { params: SpringParams; state: SpringState }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export type SliderConfig = {
    72→  id: string
    73→  label: string
    74→  min: number
    75→  max: number
    76→  step: number
    77→  value: number
    78→  unit: string
    79→}
    80→

trajectory.output:
1→import type {
     2→  PendulumParams,
     3→  PendulumState,
     4→  ProjectileParams,
     5→  ProjectileState,
     6→  SpringParams,
     7→  SpringState,
     8→  Vec2,
     9→} from './types'
    10→
    11→// --- Pendulum (RK4 integration) ---
    12→
    13→type PendulumODE = { theta: number; omega: number }
    14→
    15→const pendulumDerivative = (
    16→  state: PendulumODE,
    17→  params: PendulumParams,
    18→): PendulumODE => {
    19→  const g = params.gravity
    20→  const L = params.length
    21→  const b = params.damping
    22→  return {
    23→    theta: state.omega,
    24→    omega: -(g / L) * Math.sin(state.theta) - b * state.omega,
    25→  }
    26→}
    27→
    28→const rk4Step = (
    29→  state: PendulumODE,
    30→  params: PendulumParams,
    31→  dt: number,
    32→): PendulumODE => {
    33→  const k1 = pendulumDerivative(state, params)
    34→  const k2 = pendulumDerivative(
    35→    { theta: state.theta + (dt / 2) * k1.theta, omega: state.omega + (dt / 2) * k1.omega },
    36→    params,
    37→  )
    38→  const k3 = pendulumDerivative(
    39→    { theta: state.theta + (dt / 2) * k2.theta, omega: state.omega + (dt / 2) * k2.omega },
    40→    params,
    41→  )
    42→  const k4 = pendulumDerivative(
    43→    { theta: state.theta + dt * k3.theta, omega: state.omega + dt * k3.omega },
    44→    params,
    45→  )
    46→  return {
    47→    theta: state.theta + (dt / 6) * (k1.theta + 2 * k2.theta + 2 * k3.theta + k4.theta),
    48→    omega: state.omega + (dt / 6) * (k1.omega + 2 * k2.omega + 2 * k3.omega + k4.omega),
    49→  }
    50→}
    51→
    52→export const createPendulumState = (params: PendulumParams): PendulumState => {
    53→  const angle = (params.initialAngle * Math.PI) / 180
    54→  const L = params.length
    55→  return {
    56→    angle,
    57→    angularVelocity: 0,
    58→    angularAcceleration: -(params.gravity / L) * Math.sin(angle),
    59→    position: { x: L * Math.sin(angle), y: L * Math.cos(angle) },
    60→    velocity: 0,
    61→    acceleration: Math.abs(params.gravity * Math.sin(angle)),
    62→    kineticEnergy: 0,
    63→    potentialEnergy: params.gravity * L * (1 - Math.cos(angle)),
    64→    time: 0,
    65→  }
    66→}
    67→
    68→export const stepPendulum = (
    69→  state: PendulumState,
    70→  params: PendulumParams,
    71→  dt: number,
    72→): PendulumState => {
    73→  const ode: PendulumODE = { theta: state.angle, omega: state.angularVelocity }
    74→  const next = rk4Step(ode, params, dt)
    75→  const L = params.length
    76→  const angularAcceleration = -(params.gravity / L) * Math.sin(next.theta) - params.damping * next.omega
    77→  const linearVelocity = Math.abs(next.omega * L)
    78→  const linearAcceleration = Math.abs(angularAcceleration * L)
    79→  const height = L * (1 - Math.cos(next.theta))
    80→
    81→  return {
    82→    angle: next.theta,
    83→    angularVelocity: next.omega,
    84→    angularAcceleration,
    85→    position: { x: L * Math.sin(next.theta), y: L * Math.cos(next.theta) },
    86→    velocity: linearVelocity,
    87→    acceleration: linearAcceleration,
    88→    kineticEnergy: 0.5 * linearVelocity * linearVelocity,
    89→    potentialEnergy: params.gravity * height,
    90→    time: state.time + dt,
    91→  }
    92→}
    93→
    94→// --- Projectile Motion (analytical) ---
    95→
    96→export const createProjectileState = (params: ProjectileParams): ProjectileState => {
    97→  const angleRad = (params.angle * Math.PI) / 180
    98→  const v0 = params.initialVelocity
    99→  return {
   100→    position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
   101→    velocity: { x: v0 * Math.cos(angleRad), y: v0 * Math.sin(angleRad) },
   102→    acceleration: { x: 0, y: -params.gravity },
   103→    speed: v0,
   104→    time: 0,
   105→    kineticEnergy: 0.5 * v0 * v0,
   106→    potentialEnergy: 0,
   107→    trail: [{ x: 0, y: 0 }],
   108→    landed: false,
   109→  }
   110→}
   111→
   112→export const stepProjectile = (
   113→  state: ProjectileState,
   114→  params: ProjectileParams,
   115→  dt: number,
   116→): ProjectileState => {
   117→  if (state.landed) return state
   118→
   119→  const newTime = state.time + dt
   120→  const angleRad = (params.angle * Math.PI) / 180
   121→  const v0 = params.initialVelocity
   122→  const g = params.gravity
   123→
   124→  const x = v0 * Math.cos(angleRad) * newTime
   125→  const y = v0 * Math.sin(angleRad) * newTime - 0.5 * g * newTime * newTime
   126→  const vx = v0 * Math.cos(angleRad)
   127→  const vy = v0 * Math.sin(angleRad) - g * newTime
   128→  const speed = Math.sqrt(vx * vx + vy * vy)
   129→  const landed = y <= 0 && newTime > 0.01
   130→
   131→  const position: Vec2 = { x, y: Math.max(0, y) }
   132→  const trail = [...state.trail, { x: position.x, y: position.y }]
   133→
   134→  // Limit trail length to prevent memory issues
   135→  const trimmedTrail = trail.length > 500 ? trail.slice(trail.length - 500) : trail
   136→
   137→  return {
   138→    position,
   139→    velocity: { x: vx, y: landed ? 0 : vy },
   140→    acceleration: { x: 0, y: -g },
   141→    speed: landed ? 0 : speed,
   142→    time: newTime,
   143→    kineticEnergy: 0.5 * speed * speed,
   144→    potentialEnergy: g * Math.max(0, y),
   145→    trail: trimmedTrail,
   146→    landed,
   147→  }
   148→}
   149→
   150→// --- Spring-Mass System (RK4 integration) ---
   151→
   152→type SpringODE = { x: number; v: number }
   153→
   154→const springDerivative = (state: SpringODE, params: SpringParams): SpringODE => {
   155→  const omega2 = params.springConstant / params.mass
   156→  return {
   157→    x: state.v,
   158→    v: -omega2 * state.x - params.damping * state.v,
   159→  }
   160→}
   161→
   162→const springRK4Step = (
   163→  state: SpringODE,
   164→  params: SpringParams,
   165→  dt: number,
   166→): SpringODE => {
   167→  const k1 = springDerivative(state, params)
   168→  const k2 = springDerivative(
   169→    { x: state.x + (dt / 2) * k1.x, v: state.v + (dt / 2) * k1.v },
   170→    params,
   171→  )
   172→  const k3 = springDerivative(
   173→    { x: state.x + (dt / 2) * k2.x, v: state.v + (dt / 2) * k2.v },
   174→    params,
   175→  )
   176→  const k4 = springDerivative(
   177→    { x: state.x + dt * k3.x, v: state.v + dt * k3.v },
   178→    params,
   179→  )
   180→  return {
   181→    x: state.x + (dt / 6) * (k1.x + 2 * k2.x + 2 * k3.x + k4.x),
   182→    v: state.v + (dt / 6) * (k1.v + 2 * k2.v + 2 * k3.v + k4.v),
   183→  }
   184→}
   185→
   186→export const createSpringState = (params: SpringParams): SpringState => {
   187→  const x0 = params.initialDisplacement
   188→  const k = params.springConstant
   189→  return {
   190→    displacement: x0,
   191→    velocity: 0,
   192→    acceleration: -(k / params.mass) * x0,
   193→    time: 0,
   194→    kineticEnergy: 0,
   195→    potentialEnergy: 0.5 * k * x0 * x0,
   196→  }
   197→}
   198→
   199→export const stepSpring = (
   200→  state: SpringState,
   201→  params: SpringParams,
   202→  dt: number,
   203→): SpringState => {
   204→  const ode: SpringODE = { x: state.displacement, v: state.velocity }
   205→  const next = springRK4Step(ode, params, dt)
   206→  const acc = -(params.springConstant / params.mass) * next.x - params.damping * next.v
   207→  const k = params.springConstant
   208→
   209→  return {
   210→    displacement: next.x,
   211→    velocity: next.v,
   212→    acceleration: acc,
   213→    time: state.time + dt,
   214→    kineticEnergy: 0.5 * params.mass * next.v * next.v,
   215→    potentialEnergy: 0.5 * k * next.x * next.x,
   216→  }
   217→}
   218→

1→import { h, Fragment } from 'plaited'
     2→import type {
     3→  SimulationState,
     4→  SimulationType,
     5→  PendulumState,
     6→  PendulumParams,
     7→  ProjectileState,
     8→  ProjectileParams,
     9→  SpringState,
    10→  SpringParams,
    11→  SliderConfig,
    12→} from './types'
    13→
    14→const CANVAS_W = 600
    15→const CANVAS_H = 400
    16→
    17→const colors = {
    18→  bg: '#0f172a',
    19→  panel: '#1e293b',
    20→  border: '#334155',
    21→  accent: '#3b82f6',
    22→  accentHover: '#60a5fa',
    23→  text: '#e2e8f0',
    24→  textMuted: '#94a3b8',
    25→  pendulumRod: '#64748b',
    26→  pendulumBob: '#f59e0b',
    27→  trajectory: '#10b981',
    28→  projectile: '#ef4444',
    29→  spring: '#8b5cf6',
    30→  springMass: '#ec4899',
    31→  ground: '#475569',
    32→  grid: '#1e293b',
    33→  energy: { kinetic: '#f59e0b', potential: '#3b82f6' },
    34→}
    35→
    36→const formatNum = (n: number, decimals = 2): string =>
    37→  Number.isFinite(n) ? n.toFixed(decimals) : '0.00'
    38→
    39→// --- Slider rendering ---
    40→const renderSlider = (config: SliderConfig) =>
    41→  h('div', { style: 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:4px 0' },
    42→    h('label', {
    43→      for: config.id,
    44→      style: `color:${colors.textMuted};font-size:12px;min-width:100px`,
    45→    }, config.label),
    46→    h('input', {
    47→      type: 'range',
    48→      id: config.id,
    49→      min: String(config.min),
    50→      max: String(config.max),
    51→      step: String(config.step),
    52→      value: String(config.value),
    53→      'p-trigger': `param-change:change`,
    54→      'data-param': config.id,
    55→      style: 'flex:1;accent-color:' + colors.accent,
    56→    }),
    57→    h('span', {
    58→      style: `color:${colors.text};font-size:12px;min-width:60px;text-align:right`,
    59→    }, `${formatNum(config.value, config.step < 1 ? 2 : 1)} ${config.unit}`),
    60→  )
    61→
    62→// --- Tab navigation ---
    63→const renderTabs = (active: SimulationType) => {
    64→  const tabs: { id: SimulationType; label: string }[] = [
    65→    { id: 'pendulum', label: 'Pendulum' },
    66→    { id: 'projectile', label: 'Projectile' },
    67→    { id: 'spring', label: 'Spring-Mass' },
    68→  ]
    69→  return h('div', { style: `display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:12px` },
    70→    ...tabs.map((tab) =>
    71→      h('button', {
    72→        'p-trigger': `tab-select:click`,
    73→        'data-tab': tab.id,
    74→        style: `
    75→          padding:8px 20px;border:1px solid ${colors.border};
    76→          border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;
    77→          background:${tab.id === active ? colors.accent : colors.panel};
    78→          color:${tab.id === active ? '#fff' : colors.textMuted};
    79→          transition:all 0.15s ease;
    80→        `,
    81→      }, tab.label),
    82→    ),
    83→  )
    84→}
    85→
    86→// --- Playback controls ---
    87→const renderControls = (state: SimulationState) => {
    88→  const isPlaying = state.playback === 'playing'
    89→  const speeds = [0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4]
    90→
    91→  return h('div', { style: `display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0` },
    92→    h('button', {
    93→      'p-trigger': 'play-pause:click',
    94→      style: `
    95→        padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid ${colors.border};border-radius:6px;
    96→        background:${isPlaying ? colors.panel : colors.accent};
    97→        color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;min-width:70px;
    98→      `,
    99→    }, isPlaying ? 'Pause' : 'Play'),
   100→    h('button', {
   101→      'p-trigger': 'reset:click',
   102→      style: `
   103→        padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid ${colors.border};border-radius:6px;
   104→        background:${colors.panel};color:${colors.text};cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;
   105→      `,
   106→    }, 'Reset'),
   107→    h('span', { style: `color:${colors.textMuted};font-size:12px;margin-left:12px` }, 'Speed:'),
   108→    ...speeds.map((s) =>
   109→      h('button', {
   110→        'p-trigger': 'speed-change:click',
   111→        'data-speed': String(s),
   112→        style: `
   113→          padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid ${colors.border};border-radius:4px;
   114→          background:${state.speed === s ? colors.accent : colors.panel};
   115→          color:${state.speed === s ? '#fff' : colors.textMuted};
   116→          cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;
   117→        `,
   118→      }, `${s}x`),
   119→    ),
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
   123→// --- Pendulum SVG ---
   124→const renderPendulumCanvas = (state: PendulumState, params: PendulumParams) => {
   125→  const cx = CANVAS_W / 2
   126→  const cy = 60
   127→  const scale = 120 / params.length // pixels per meter, normalized
   128→  const bobX = cx + state.position.x * scale
   129→  const bobY = cy + state.position.y * scale
   130→  const bobRadius = 16
   131→
   132→  // Arc showing initial angle range
   133→  const arcRadius = 40
   134→  const arcStartAngle = -params.initialAngle * Math.PI / 180
   135→  const arcEndAngle = params.initialAngle * Math.PI / 180
   136→  const arcX1 = cx + arcRadius * Math.sin(arcStartAngle)
   137→  const arcY1 = cy + arcRadius * Math.cos(arcStartAngle)
   138→  const arcX2 = cx + arcRadius * Math.sin(arcEndAngle)
   139→  const arcY2 = cy + arcRadius * Math.cos(arcEndAngle)
   140→
   141→  return h('svg', {
   142→    width: String(CANVAS_W),
   143→    height: String(CANVAS_H),
   144→    style: `background:${colors.bg};border-radius:8px;border:1px solid ${colors.border}`,
   145→  },
   146→    // Grid lines
   147→    ...Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => {
   148→      const y = (i + 1) * (CANVAS_H / 8)
   149→      return h('line', {
   150→        x1: '0', y1: String(y), x2: String(CANVAS_W), y2: String(y),
   151→        stroke: colors.grid, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '4,4',
   152→      })
   153→    }),
   154→    // Pivot point
   155→    h('circle', { cx: String(cx), cy: String(cy), r: '5', fill: colors.ground }),
   156→    // Angle arc
   157→    h('path', {
   158→      d: `M ${arcX1} ${arcY1} A ${arcRadius} ${arcRadius} 0 0 1 ${arcX2} ${arcY2}`,
   159→      fill: 'none', stroke: colors.textMuted, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '3,3',
   160→    }),
   161→    // Vertical reference line
   162→    h('line', {
   163→      x1: String(cx), y1: String(cy), x2: String(cx), y2: String(cy + 50),
   164→      stroke: colors.textMuted, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '3,3',
   165→    }),
   166→    // Rod
   167→    h('line', {
   168→      x1: String(cx), y1: String(cy), x2: String(bobX), y2: String(bobY),
   169→      stroke: colors.pendulumRod, 'stroke-width': '2',
   170→    }),
   171→    // Bob
   172→    h('circle', {
   173→      cx: String(bobX), cy: String(bobY), r: String(bobRadius),
   174→      fill: colors.pendulumBob, stroke: '#d97706', 'stroke-width': '2',
   175→    }),
   176→    // Velocity vector
   177→    h('line', {
   178→      x1: String(bobX),
   179→      y1: String(bobY),
   180→      x2: String(bobX + state.angularVelocity * scale * 0.5),
   181→      y2: String(bobY),
   182→      stroke: colors.energy.kinetic, 'stroke-width': '2',
   183→      'marker-end': 'url(#arrow)',
   184→    }),
   185→    // Arrow marker def
   186→    h('defs', {},
   187→      h('marker', {
   188→        id: 'arrow', viewBox: '0 0 10 10', refX: '10', refY: '5',
   189→        markerWidth: '6', markerHeight: '6', orient: 'auto-start-reverse',
   190→      },
   191→        h('path', { d: 'M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z', fill: colors.energy.kinetic }),
   192→      ),
   193→    ),
   194→    // Labels
   195→    h('text', {
   196→      x: '10', y: '25', fill: colors.textMuted, 'font-size': '12', 'font-family': 'monospace',
   197→    }, `\u03B8 = ${formatNum((state.angle * 180) / Math.PI, 1)}\u00B0`),
   198→    h('text', {
   199→      x: '10', y: '42', fill: colors.textMuted, 'font-size': '12', 'font-family': 'monospace',
   200→    }, `t = ${formatNum(state.time, 1)}s`),
   201→  )
   202→}
   203→
   204→// --- Projectile SVG ---
   205→const renderProjectileCanvas = (state: ProjectileState, params: ProjectileParams) => {
   206→  // Calculate range for scaling
   207→  const angleRad = (params.angle * Math.PI) / 180
   208→  const v0 = params.initialVelocity
   209→  const g = params.gravity
   210→  const maxRange = (v0 * v0 * Math.sin(2 * angleRad)) / g
   211→  const maxHeight = (v0 * v0 * Math.sin(angleRad) * Math.sin(angleRad)) / (2 * g)
   212→
   213→  const margin = 40
   214→  const plotW = CANVAS_W - 2 * margin
   215→  const plotH = CANVAS_H - 2 * margin
   216→  const scaleX = plotW / Math.max(maxRange * 1.1, 1)
   217→  const scaleY = plotH / Math.max(maxHeight * 1.3, 1)
   218→  const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY)
   219→
   220→  const groundY = CANVAS_H - margin
   221→
   222→  const toScreenX = (x: number) => margin + x * scale
   223→  const toScreenY = (y: number) => groundY - y * scale
   224→
   225→  // Trail path
   226→  const trailPoints = state.trail
   227→    .map((p) => `${toScreenX(p.x)},${toScreenY(p.y)}`)
   228→    .join(' ')
   229→
   230→  return h('svg', {
   231→    width: String(CANVAS_W),
   232→    height: String(CANVAS_H),
   233→    style: `background:${colors.bg};border-radius:8px;border:1px solid ${colors.border}`,
   234→  },
   235→    // Ground
   236→    h('line', {
   237→      x1: String(margin), y1: String(groundY),
   238→      x2: String(CANVAS_W - margin), y2: String(groundY),
   239→      stroke: colors.ground, 'stroke-width': '2',
   240→    }),
   241→    // Y axis
   242→    h('line', {
   243→      x1: String(margin), y1: String(margin),
   244→      x2: String(margin), y2: String(groundY),
   245→      stroke: colors.ground, 'stroke-width': '1',
   246→    }),
   247→    // Grid
   248→    ...Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => {
   249→      const y = groundY - ((i + 1) * plotH) / 6
   250→      return h('line', {
   251→        x1: String(margin), y1: String(y),
   252→        x2: String(CANVAS_W - margin), y2: String(y),
   253→        stroke: colors.grid, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '4,4',
   254→      })
   255→    }),
   256→    // Trajectory trail
   257→    state.trail.length > 1
   258→      ? h('polyline', {
   259→          points: trailPoints,
   260→          fill: 'none', stroke: colors.trajectory, 'stroke-width': '2', opacity: '0.7',
   261→        })
   262→      : h('g', {}),
   263→    // Launch angle indicator
   264→    h('line', {

   276→    }),
   277→    // Velocity vector
   278→    h('line', {

   282→      y2: String(toScreenY(state.position.y) - state.velocity.y * 1.5),

   294→    }, `t = ${formatNum(state.time, 1)}s`),
   295→  )
   296→}
   297→
   298→// --- Spring-Mass SVG ---
   299→const renderSpringCanvas = (state: SpringState, params: SpringParams) => {
   300→  const anchorX = 80
   301→  const anchorY = CANVAS_H / 2
   302→  const equilibriumX = CANVAS_W / 2
   303→  const scale = 150 // pixels per meter
   304→  const massX = equilibriumX + state.displacement * scale
   305→  const massSize = 30
   306→
   307→  // Draw spring zigzag from anchor to mass
   308→  const numCoils = 12
   309→  const springStartX = anchorX + 20
   310→  const springEndX = massX - massSize / 2
   311→  const coilWidth = (springEndX - springStartX) / numCoils
   312→  const coilAmplitude = 15
   313→
   314→  const springPathParts: string[] = [`M ${springStartX} ${anchorY}`]
   315→  for (let i = 0; i < numCoils; i++) {
   316→    const x1 = springStartX + (i + 0.25) * coilWidth
   317→    const x2 = springStartX + (i + 0.75) * coilWidth
   318→    const x3 = springStartX + (i + 1) * coilWidth
   319→    const yOff = i % 2 === 0 ? -coilAmplitude : coilAmplitude
   320→    springPathParts.push(`L ${x1} ${anchorY + yOff}`)
   321→    springPathParts.push(`L ${x2} ${anchorY - yOff}`)
   322→    springPathParts.push(`L ${x3} ${anchorY}`)
   323→  }
   324→  const springPath = springPathParts.join(' ')

   326→  // Energy bar heights

   335→  },

   338→      x: String(anchorX - 5), y: String(anchorY - 60),
   339→      width: '10', height: '120',
   340→      fill: colors.ground, rx: '2',
   341→    }),
   342→    // Wall hatching
   343→    ...Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, i) => {
   344→      const y = anchorY - 50 + i * 20
   345→      return h('line', {
   346→        x1: String(anchorX - 5), y1: String(y),
   347→        x2: String(anchorX - 15), y2: String(y + 10),
   348→        stroke: colors.ground, 'stroke-width': '1',
   349→      })
   350→    }),
   351→    // Equilibrium line
   352→    h('line', {
   353→      x1: String(equilibriumX), y1: String(anchorY - 80),
   354→      x2: String(equilibriumX), y2: String(anchorY + 80),
   355→      stroke: colors.textMuted, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '4,4',
   356→    }),
   357→    h('text', {
   358→      x: String(equilibriumX - 5), y: String(anchorY + 95),
   359→      fill: colors.textMuted, 'font-size': '10', 'font-family': 'monospace',
   360→    }, 'x=0'),
   361→    // Spring
   362→    h('path', {
   363→      d: springPath,
   364→      fill: 'none', stroke: colors.spring, 'stroke-width': '2.5',
   365→      'stroke-linecap': 'round', 'stroke-linejoin': 'round',
   366→    }),
   367→    // Mass block
   368→    h('rect', {
   369→      x: String(massX - massSize / 2), y: String(anchorY - massSize / 2),
   370→      width: String(massSize), height: String(massSize),
   371→      fill: colors.springMass, stroke: '#db2777', 'stroke-width': '2', rx: '4',
   372→    }),
   373→    h('text', {

   377→    // Ground/rail
   378→    h('line', {

   380→      x2: String(CANVAS_W - 40), y2: String(anchorY + massSize / 2 + 5),
   381→      stroke: colors.ground, 'stroke-width': '1', 'stroke-dasharray': '6,3',
   382→    }),
   383→    // Energy bars
   384→    h('rect', {

   386→      width: '18', height: String(Math.max(keBarH, 1)),
   387→      fill: colors.energy.kinetic, rx: '2',
   388→    }),
   389→    h('text', {
